reasoning: XLK +0.55% shows tech leadership above the 0.5% threshold, but XLF -0.35% + XLE -0.19% reveal weakness in financials and energy. This is a divergence, NOT classic risk-on (which would see tech AND financials up together). The premarket SPY +0.49% is following tech upward, but breadth is narrow — only one sector driving. VIX has risen +3.07% overnight despite sector gains, suggesting underlying risk-off sentiment beneath the surface. Ribbon is MIXED (no bullish alignment), and overnight gap was -2.34 points. Directional bias is uncertain; financial weakness creates a headwind against the tech bounce.
key_observations: XLK: +0.55% (clear tech leadership above threshold, bullish for SPY given 30% weighting)
XLF: -0.35% (financial weakness contradicts risk-on narrative, suggests caution on rates/credit)
Overall rotation: Divergence — tech up but finance down. NOT risk-on; mixed/cautious.
